name: zhaoyang-dng-kepu-wenan-suchanchu
description: Codex skills for Zhaoyang-style Chinese public-education video scripts, Excalidraw explainer canvases, and MCP canvas operations.

interface.displayName: 朝阳不吐不快 dng 科普文案速产出
interface.shortDescription: 生成中文科普讲解稿，并组织配套 Excalidraw 教学画布。
interface.longDescription: 面向中文科普视频工作流的 Codex plugin，内置口播稿写作、Excalidraw 知识图设计，以及通过 MCP 或 REST fallback 操作实时画布的工具箱。
defaultPrompt: Use $zhaoyang-explainer-scriptwriter to draft a Chinese explainer video script.
Use $zhaoyang-excalidraw-explainer to design an Excalidraw explainer canvas.
Use $zhaoyang-excalidraw-toolkit to inspect and export the live canvas.
